summary: Completed testing of CLT Synapse ERP Iteration 11 features: Phone country auto-detection, Lead source dropdown, Kanban drag-and-drop, User dialog z-index fix, and Role Management. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.

minor.issue: When custom roles exist in DB, system roles are not returned. Should merge system roles with custom roles.

passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication works correctly
Backend: GET /api/roles - Returns roles list
Backend: GET /api/roles - Role structure validation
Backend: POST /api/roles - Create custom role
Backend: PUT /api/roles/{role_id} - Update role permissions
Backend: PUT /api/roles/{role_id} - Update system role permissions
Backend: DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} - Cannot delete system roles (expected)
Backend: DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} - Delete custom role
Backend: /api/roles - Requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/leads - Create lead with lead_source field
Backend: POST /api/leads - All 8 lead sources work (facebook, instagram, google_ads, website, referral, walk_in, cold_call, other)
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{lead_id} - Update lead stage (kanban simulation)
Backend: GET /api/leads - Returns lead_source field
Backend: GET /api/users - Returns users list
Backend: POST /api/users - Create user with role assignment
Backend: Lead with UAE phone (+971) accepts country=UAE
Backend: Lead with India phone (+91) accepts country=India
Backend: Lead with Saudi phone (+966) accepts country=Saudi Arabia
Frontend: Login and module selection works
Frontend: Sales CRM Kanban board loads with 8 columns
Frontend: Lead form - Phone country auto-detection shows 'Auto-detected: UAE' for +971
Frontend: Lead form - Country dropdown auto-populated to UAE
Frontend: Lead form - Lead Source dropdown shows 8 options
Frontend: User Management page loads correctly
Frontend: User dialog - Role dropdown visible above dialog (z-index fix working)
Frontend: User dialog - 10 role options available
Frontend: Role Management page loads with role cards
Frontend: Create Role modal - Basic Info tab with color picker and data visibility
Frontend: Create Role modal - Module Access tab available
Frontend: Kanban drag-and-drop - Drag handles visible on lead cards
Frontend: Kanban drag-and-drop - Drop zones visible in empty columns
Frontend: Kanban drag-and-drop - Visual feedback during drag operation
critical_code_review_comments: Phone country detection utility (phoneCountry.js) maps 60+ country codes correctly
Lead source dropdown has all 8 required options
Kanban uses @dnd-kit library for drag-and-drop with proper sensors and collision detection
Role Management API properly prevents deletion of system roles
User dialog z-index fix applied using position='popper' and className='z-[9999]' on SelectContent
Minor: GET /api/roles should merge system roles with custom roles from DB instead of returning only DB roles
seed_data_creation: Test leads and roles created during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully implemented and tested: 1) Phone country auto-detection in lead form (60+ country codes in phoneCountry.js). 2) Lead source dropdown with 8 options (Facebook, Instagram, Google Ads, Website, Referral, Walk-in, Cold Call, Other). 3) Kanban drag-and-drop using @dnd-kit library in SalesCRMPage.jsx. 4) User dialog z-index fix for dropdowns. 5) Role Management page with CRUD operations at /api/roles. Note: GET /api/roles returns only DB roles when custom roles exist - may want to merge with system roles.

features_verified.kanban_drag_drop: Working - Visual feedback during drag, stage updates via API
features_verified.role_management_crud: Working - GET, POST, PUT, DELETE endpoints functional
features_verified.role_management_ui: Working - Create/Edit role with module permissions and data visibility
